person.name: Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
geni.com
Viscountess Jeanne de Châtellerault
Also Known As:	"de Lusignan"
Birthdate:	circa 1226
Birthplace:	France
Death:	May 16, 1315 (84-93)
Harcourt, Eure, Normandy, France
Immediate Family:	
Daughter of Aimery II de Châtellerault, Vicomte de Châtellerault and Agathe de Dammartin, Dame de Ponthieu
Wife of Geoffrey of Lusignan and Jean II, seigneur d'Harcourt
Mother of Eustachie de Lusignan; Jean III, seigneur d'Harcourt; Jeanne D'avaugour and Marguerite d'Harcourt
Occupation:	Vicomtesse, de Châtellerault, Dame, de LillebonnevvvViscountess of Chatellerault.
==========
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy
 JEANNE de Châtellerault Dame de Lillebonne Vicomtesse de Châtellerault, daughter of JEAN Vicomte de Châtellerault & his wife Mathilde de Dammartin ([1243/47]-16 May 1315).  Her birth date is estimated on the assumption that she was an adolescent at the time of her first marriage, but young enough to have had children born after [1276] by her second husband.  "Johanna de Castro Ayraudi relicta Gaufridi de Lesigniaco" swore homage to Saint-Maixent for certain property by charter dated 4 Mar 1275[761].  She married secondly ([1276]) as his second wife, Jean [II] “le Preux” Seigneur d’Harcourt, who became Vicomte de Châtellerault by right of his wife.  Her family origin and second marriage are indicated by a charter dated 20 May 1280 in which her second husband is named “Ioannes de Haricuria ratione uxoris vicecomes Castri-Airaudi”[762].  A register dated early Nov 1286 records the settlement between “Jean de Harcourt sire de Qualeuille et Mareschal de France” and “Dame Beatrix comtesse de Dreux et de Montfort” concerning revenue from Lillebonne “pour raison de nostre fame fille le viscomte et la viscomtesse de Chasteleraut fille et heir d’iceux”[763].  "Johan saignour de Harecourt et…Johanne fame doudit Johan fille et heir…debonne memoire Johan iadis vicomte de Chatel-Heraut et saignour de Soonnays" recognised the privileges of Perseigne abbey by charter dated Mar 1291

zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT於1239年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯維安a特勒勞爾特時，她的父親Aimery Maingot de Châtterault II34歲，母親Agathe de Dammartin22歲。她於大約1259年與Geoffrey de Lusignan在法國波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1315年5月16日享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT于1239年出生在法国波特-哈倫斯維安a特勒勞爾特时，她的父亲Aimery Maingot de Châtterault II34岁，母亲Agathe de Dammartin22岁。她于大约1259年与Geoffrey de Lusignan在法国波特-哈倫斯維安盧希南结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1315年5月16日享年76岁。

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT was born in 1239, in Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, her father, Aimery Maingot de Châtterault II, was 34 and her mother, Agathe de Dammartin, was 22. She married Geoffrey de Lusignan about 1259, in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 16 May 1315, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT est née en 1239, à Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Aimery Maingot de Châtterault II, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Agathe de Dammartin, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffrey de Lusignan environ 1259, à Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 16 mai 1315, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT 1239 in Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aimery Maingot de Châtterault II 34 und ihre Mutter Agathe de Dammartin 22. Sie hat um 1259 in Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich Geoffrey de Lusignan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 16. Mai 1315 im Alter von 76 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT è nata il nel 1239 nel Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, sua padre, Aimery Maingot de Châtterault II, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Agathe de Dammartin, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Geoffrey de Lusignan circa 1259, nel Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 maggio 1315, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de CHATELLERAULTが1239年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンチaテラーアウルトで生まれた時，父Aimery Maingot de Châtterault IIは34歳，母Agathe de Dammartinは22歳であった。約1259年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンルシグナンでGeoffrey de Lusignanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1315年5月16日に76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT(이)가 1239년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 cha텔레라트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aimery Maingot de Châtterault II(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agathe de Dammartin(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1259년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 루시그난에서 Geoffrey de Lusignan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1315년 5월 16일 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT nasceu em 1239, em Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Aimery Maingot de Châtterault II, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Agathe de Dammartin, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey de Lusignan aproximadamente 1259, em Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 16 de maio de 1315, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT родилась в 1239 г. в местности чaтеллираулт, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Aimery Maingot de Châtterault II было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Agathe de Dammartin, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey de Lusignan около 1259 г. в местности лусигнан, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 16 мая 1315 г. в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT nació en 1239, en Châtellerault, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, su papá, Aimery Maingot de Châtterault II, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Agathe de Dammartin, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Geoffrey de Lusignan aproximadamente 1259, en Lusignan, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de mayo de 1315, a la edad de 76 años.
